message:
refactor(cli): Replace process.exit with throws + minor optimizations

CLI error handling:
- audit.ts: Replace process.exit(1) with throw err
  Allows callers (MCP server, tests) to catch and handle errors
  gracefully instead of killing the entire process
- validate.ts: Replace process.exit(1) with throw new Error()
  Same rationale: programmatic callers can now handle validation
  errors without process termination

Minor optimizations:
- sanitize.ts: Reuse existing RegExp if it already has 'g' flag
  instead of always creating new RegExp with flags + "g"
  Avoids unnecessary object allocation in hot path
- utils.ts: Simplify withAbortCheck() by removing unused interval-based
  checking. The checkIntervalMs parameter couldn't actually interrupt
  promises externally, so remove the dead code path

Test fix:
- performance.e2e.test.ts: Fix logger context typing by explicitly
  passing object with named properties instead of spread
  Resolves typecheck errors with strict typing

These changes improve composability: command modules can be used as
library functions without risk of unexpected process termination.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
